expectedQuestions.decisionValue: ONE high-value diagnostic question only — choose based on context: 'Professor slides/exam guide available?' → if yes, compress to key 30-40p; 'Did you attend classes?' → attendance reduces reading load; 'Did professor hint exam topics?' → can cut 300p to <100p. Do NOT fix to one specific question.

effortModel.citation: TRIAGE mode: ultra-fast skim. Index scan + chapter summaries only. NOT normal reading speed.

expectedStrategy: TRIAGE: 300p full reading is IMPOSSIBLE in 45min
Focus on 30-40p: index/glossary scan 5min + chapter summaries+key terms 20min + weakest chapter 15min + quick review 5min = 45min total
Overnight all-nighter NOT recommended — sleep benefits exam performance
warnings: Do NOT promise '20% content = 60-70% score' — use '기본 개념이라도 잡으면 찍기보다 나은 결과'
toneExpectation: calm and practical in panic — '할 수 있는 최선을 하자. 완벽 안 돼도 괜찮아.'
